Industrial Vision Solutions

Complete vision solutions based on HDMI HD cameras, microscope cameras, and smart cameras, covering electronic production line inspection, microscopic observation, AI intelligent detection and more

HDMI HD Output + Smart AI Detection

Electronics Production Line Inspection

For HD real-time inspection needs of electronic manufacturing production lines, providing plug-and-play HDMI cameras and smart cameras with built-in AI algorithms

1080P~4K HD output
AI automatic defect detection
USB storage support

4K HD Imaging, Digital Microscopy

Microscope Vision Solution

For microscopic observation needs in biomedical, material analysis, and industrial inspection fields, providing 4K HD microscope cameras

4K/1080P HD imaging
HDMI real-time display
Image/video recording support
C-mount compatible with various microscopes

Smart-4k-80Smart-6500Smart-6000HS-3500M
Built-in Deep Learning, No PC Required

AI Smart Vision Solution

For intelligent detection needs of industrial automation production lines, providing smart cameras with built-in AI algorithms, supporting defect detection and positioning recognition

Built-in AI algorithm
No external computer needed
Detection speed <50ms
Accuracy 99.5%
